title: Clean Leitstand DNS ambiguity
goal: Remove the stale 192.168.178.46 A answer for leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa so Pi-hole and clients resolve only the heim-pc address 192.168.178.55.

acceptance.assertion: dig against Pi-hole returns exactly one A record for leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa: 192.168.178.55.
curl -k -I https://leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa/ succeeds without --resolve from heim-pc.

metadata.outcome: Pi-hole backup-like files that still carried the old 192.168.178.46 Leitstand A record were moved out of active Pi-hole configuration, pihole-FTL was restarted, and heim-pc now resolves leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa only to 192.168.178.55.

verified_acceptance.single-a-record: getent ahostsv4 and dig from heim-pc returned only 192.168.178.55 for leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa.
verified_acceptance.canonical-smoke: curl -k -I https://leitstand.heimgewebe.home.arpa/ returned HTTP/2 200 via Caddy without --resolve.
